hero.subtitle: SonoX leverages advanced deep learning to analyze ultrasound images, assisting clinicians in accurate lesion detection, boundary delineation, and malignancy classification across multiple body regions.
hero.trust_notice: Developed by Prof. Michael Ying's research group at The Hong Kong Polytechnic University. For research purposes only.

instructions.title: Quick Start Guide
instructions.content_1: Select a body region to analyze (e.g., Lymph Node, Breast, Thyroid)
instructions.content_2: Upload your ultrasound image or select from reference samples
instructions.content_3: Click "Start Analysis" to view AI segmentation and classification results

workspace.title: Analysis Workspace
workspace.subtitle: Select a body region, then upload or choose an ultrasound image to begin AI-empowered analysis

upload.title: Upload Image
upload.subtitle: Drag and drop or click to upload

samples.title: Reference Samples
samples.subtitle: Click any sample to load it

gt.title: Ground Truth
gt.subtitle: Expert-annotated reference mask
gt.placeholder: Select a reference sample to view ground truth

results.title: AI Lesion Segmentation
results.subtitle: Compare results from multiple AI models
results.subtitle_full: Compare results from all six models
results.placeholder: Upload an image and click Start Analysis

cls.title: AI Lesion Classification
cls.subtitle: Benign vs. malignant probability prediction based on segmentation
cls.placeholder_text: Classification results will appear after segmentation
cls.no_lesion_text: Classification requires a lesion. The AI model did not detect any lesion in this image.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: An AI-empowered ultrasound analysis platform for lesion segmentation and malignancy classification
about.what_1: An AI-empowered platform integrating deep learning models for ultrasound lesion segmentation and malignancy classification
about.what_2: Assists clinicians in identifying and delineating lesion boundaries with high precision
about.what_3: Covers lymph nodes, breast, thyroid, and prostate ultrasound imaging
about.seg_1: Based on UNet architecture with semi-supervised learning (Switch framework)
about.seg_2: Trained with as little as 5% labeled data while maintaining competitive performance
about.seg_3: Supports multi-region ultrasound segmentation across 6 clinical datasets
about.cls_1: Vision Transformer (ViT) extracts deep visual features from lesion regions
about.cls_2: Radiomics neural network captures handcrafted morphological and texture features
about.cls_3: Dual-branch classification head fuses ViT and radiomics features for benign vs. malignant prediction
about.pub_1: Published in IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems (TNNLS), 2026
about.pub_2: Validated on 6 clinical datasets from multiple medical centers
about.pub_3: Demonstrates strong generalization across diverse patient populations

disclaimer.title: Important Medical Disclaimer
disclaimer.text: SonoX is designed for research and educational purposes only. It is not a certified medical diagnostic tool. All AI-generated results are for reference only and must not replace professional medical judgment, clinical examination, or established diagnostic procedures. Always consult qualified healthcare professionals for medical decisions.
